creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Failed runs:

https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-build/9799/console
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-armv7-build/2129/console

Output (from FreeBSD-head-i386-build/9799)

The order looks correct but might be the timing is too close or some path issues.

00:10:50.832 --- lib/libgcc_s__L ---
00:10:50.832 sh /usr/src/tools/install.sh -l rs -o root -g wheel -m 755  /usr/obj/usr/src/i386.i386/tmp/lib/libgcc_s.so.1  /usr/obj/usr/src/i386.i386/tmp/usr/lib/libgcc_s.so

...

00:10:50.836 --- lib/libgssapi__L ---
00:10:50.836 /usr/obj/usr/src/i386.i386/tmp/usr/bin/ld: error: unable to find library -lgcc_s

...

00:10:50.838 --- lib/libgssapi__L ---
00:10:50.838 cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
